runTitle: Cloud Tasks Job Queue production smoke - v8.11.52

aiLatencyObservations.surface: Cloud Tasks Job Queue production smoke
aiLatencyObservations.source: Cloud Run direct QA result payload and request log

expertAssessments.rationale: v8.11.52 tag pipeline completed deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke. Production Cloud Tasks worker execution returned POST /api/jobs/process 200 instead of the pre-fix 302->GET 404 path.
A live thinking-mode job completed through the async queue, stored a Redis result, and returned a non-empty AI answer with tool evidence.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.52 Cloud Tasks production smoke; effective $18.4121, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.

Queue openmanager-ai-jobs is RUNNING with 1 dispatch/sec and 2 max concurrent dispatches. This smoke used one Cloud Tasks task; Google Cloud Tasks pricing lists the first 1M operations per month as free.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud tasks queues describe openmanager-ai-jobs --location asia-northeast1

completedImprovements.title: Cloud Tasks worker target uses HTTPS in production
completedImprovements.evidence: Pre-fix Cloud Tasks delivery hit POST http://*.run.app/api/jobs/process -> 302 -> GET /api/jobs/process 404. v8.11.52 generated the HTTPS target and Cloud Run logged Google-Cloud-Tasks POST /api/jobs/process 200.

notes: Production smoke before the fix failed for job codex-cloudtasks-20260428220118: dispatch returned 202 but job stayed queued and final result returned 404.
Cloud Run request logs showed Cloud Tasks POST to http://ai-engine-jdhrhws7ia-an.a.run.app/api/jobs/process returning 302, followed by Hono receiving GET /api/jobs/process 404.
v8.11.52 fixed the target URL builder to preserve local HTTP but force HTTPS for proxied non-local task targets or honor X-Forwarded-Proto.
Post-fix smoke job codex-cloudtasks-20260428222030 completed in 16.988s through Cloud Tasks and Redis result polling.
